speaker: speaker1
text: Hi Jim . Do you have a minute ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Some of us are going to start a soccer team . Would you like to join us ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I don ’ t know anything about it . Soccer isn ’ t as popular in my country as it is here .

speaker: speaker1
text: That ’ s all right . We ’ ll teach you .

speaker: speaker2
text: Is it anything like American football ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Not very much . It ’ s something like hockey , except that you use a big ball and no stick .

speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ ll come down and watch you play some day , and see what it ’ s like .

speaker: speaker1
text: Good idea . I think you ’ ll like it if you give it a chance .
